summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO 🦩 Unable to update Charge Case
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows "can't be updated" message instead of update button for Voyager Legend 50 Charge Case on outdated firmware
description_clean: When a Poly Voyager Legend 50 Charge Case is on outdated firmware, the Device Settings > Software screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app shows a message saying "This product can't be updated in HP Poly Studio Mobile. Use HP Poly Studio Desktop to update this product" instead of providing an update button. Expected behavior: Users should be able to update the Legend 50 Charge Case firmware directly from the mobile app.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure the Poly Voyager Legend 50 Charge Case is connected.
3. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Scroll down and tap on 'Software' (or 'Firmware Update') in the Device Settings menu.
5. Observe the message displayed on the Software screen.
expected: The Software screen should display an update button allowing the user to update the Legend 50 Charge Case firmware directly from the Poly Studio Mobile app.
actual: The Software screen displays the message: "This product can't be updated in HP Poly Studio Mobile. Use HP Poly Studio Desktop to update this product" with no update button available.
